name: openclaw-frontier-stack
description: Interoperable agent skills + hooks + orchestration harness. 87 skills (47 marketing + creative as Modern Skills, 37 engineering workflow, 3 operator), 11 role contracts, engineer CLI (openclaw) with goal templating + state persistence + ticketing v2, live agent runner daemon, 4 coordination patterns plus subagent fan-out, goal v3 (failure-recovery, sub-goals, gantt, diff, cancellation), 5 autonomous loops, a Rust core workspace with N-API FFI, Hermes-port system layer (cron, doctor, webhook, supply-chain advisory, event-hook lifecycle), graded release-gate with mutation testing + live-model scorecards, and a Neo/Yoru/Rei integration installer. Compatible with any agent that supports the Agent Skills specification (agentskills.io).
